  • Method Details

    • getElements

    • getShapes

    • addShape

      public StructureDefinition.Builder<T> addShape(String name, String[][] structurePiece)
      Adds shape. Shape is a two-dimensional string array. Each character inside any of these strings will be later mapped to a particular type of IStructureElement as indicated by addElement(Character, IStructureElement).

      next char is next block(a) next string is next line(b) next string[] is next slice(c)

      There are a few special reserved characters that are pre-mapped to some common structure elements

      • + is anything but air
      • - is air checks
      • space bar is skip
      • ~ is also skip (but marks controller position, not optional)
      • char A000-FFFF range is reserved for generated skips

      Parameters:
      name - unlocalized/code name
      structurePiece - generated or written struct - DO NOT STORE IT ANYWHERE, or at least set them to null afterwards
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addElement

      @Deprecated public StructureDefinition.Builder<T> addElement(Character name, IStructureElement<T> structurePiece)

      use the unboxed version
